Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class OmniDataTransform

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.OmniDataTransform
public class OmniDataTransform extends Metadata

Java class for OmniDataTransform complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="OmniDataTransform">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="active" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="assignmentRulesUsed" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="deletedOnSuccess" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="errorIgnored" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="expectedInputJson" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="expectedInputOtherData" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="expectedInputXml" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="expectedOutputJson" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="expectedOutputOtherData" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="expectedOutputXml" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="fieldLevelSecurityEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="inputParsingClass" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="inputType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}OmniDataTransformInputType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="namespace" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="nullInputsIncludedInOutput" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="omniDataTransformItem" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}OmniDataTransformItem" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="outputParsingClass" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="outputType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="overrideKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="preprocessorClassName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="previewJsonData" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="previewOtherData" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="previewSourceObjectData" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="previewXmlData" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="processSuperBulk" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="requiredPermission" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="responseCacheTtlMinutes" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="responseCacheType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="rollbackOnError" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sourceObject" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sourceObjectDefault" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="synchronousProcessThreshold" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="targetOutputDocumentIdentifier" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="targetOutputFileName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="type" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="uniqueName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="versionNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="xmlDeclarationRemoved" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="xmlOutputTagsOrder" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

    • getOmniDataTransformItem

      public List<OmniDataTransformItem> getOmniDataTransformItem()
      Gets the value of the omniDataTransformItem property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the omniDataTransformItem property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getOmniDataTransformItem().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list OmniDataTransformItem

      Returns:
      The value of the omniDataTransformItem property.
